problem.summary: Compute fp32 scaled dot-product attention with a block mask. The baseline scans every key and checks the block mask. The optimized skeleton iterates only listed key blocks for each query block and uses online softmax accumulation.
outputs: output[query, dim] contains masked attention result for one head
constraints: baseline block_mask is dense query-block by key-block metadata
optimized seed expects CSR-style block_offsets and block_columns
no dropout, bias, rotary, matrix cores, or paged KV in this scaffold

verification.method: TODO: compare dense block-mask and block-list outputs against CPU masked attention for the same sparsity pattern.

curation.notes: Template-only block-sparse attention scaffold. FlashAttention, Composable Kernel, vLLM, and FlashInfer are reference and competitor paths; this seed makes the custom sparsity surface explicit before benchmarking.
